name: Ami Han | White Fox
description:
“I could’ve used your help a few minutes ago, Black Cat got away..though I can’t help but feel like she did something to me while we fought..”

Hey guys! I said I would make white fox next so here she is! I was so tempted to make someone else..but I knew I had to keep my word so I made her first!

sorry I’ve been so busy, I was suppose to make a bot during the spring event, but I was too busy to do so, so I apologize.

Anyways, the next bot I really wanted to do was toph from the movie, I’ve been seeing so many good pics that I really wanted to make her since she was so hot 🥹

But at the same time black cat also just dropped, so let me know who you guys want first, black cat? Or toph? (Adult of course)

Anyways, I hope you guys enjoy the bot! I love you all, bye bye! 🩵🤍🩵

Extra pics!

This one I might make and will be a civilian pov where she seduces you to get info, lmk if you guys want that too!

Okay that’s it bye bye!

(Man I can’t have SHIT on this site)
creator: Capt
